fault_entries.mechanism: Mild external load and gust torque raise tracking effort and produce coupled motion-residual deviation while remaining closer to the nominal operating envelope.
maintenance: Inspect aerodynamic/load command mismatch.
Review disturbance observer tuning and load path margins.

fault_entries.mechanism: Severe external torque drives sustained position and speed residual growth, pushing q-axis current demand upward and widening load-path deviation.
maintenance: Check external load source and aerodynamic disturbance level.
Verify commanded motion envelope against actuator capability.

fault_entries.mechanism: Friction growth increases resisting torque, elevates current demand, and degrades mechanical transmission efficiency during reversals.
maintenance: Inspect lubrication condition and gear train wear.
Check seal drag and transmission alignment.

fault_entries.mechanism: A jam constrains load motion while the controller continues to build torque and current, causing rapid shaft twist and residual escalation.
maintenance: Stop aggressive actuation and inspect linkage blockage immediately.
Check end-stop, gearbox and driven surface interference.

fault_entries.mechanism: Position sensing bias misaligns the outer-loop error calculation and induces incorrect correction effort even when mechanical motion remains feasible.
maintenance: Recalibrate the load-side position sensor.
Cross-check sensor bias against motor encoder consistency.

fault_entries.mechanism: Frozen motor encoder feedback corrupts electrical angle observation and propagates into dq control mismatch and residual growth.
maintenance: Inspect motor encoder communication and sampling path.
Verify electrical angle observer fallback logic.

fault_entries.mechanism: Increased winding resistance raises copper loss and thermal stress, reducing current efficiency and tightening the available voltage-current margin.
maintenance: Inspect winding insulation and connector integrity.
Review thermal derating thresholds and cooling path.

fault_entries.mechanism: Flux linkage loss reduces back-EMF and torque constant, forcing higher current for the same mechanical output.
maintenance: Inspect rotor magnetic health and thermal exposure history.
Compare torque constant estimate against nominal calibration.

fault_entries.mechanism: Thermal saturation raises winding temperature and triggers current derating, which then propagates to tracking degradation and electrical stress.
maintenance: Inspect cooling path and housing heat rejection.
Reduce duty cycle and confirm temperature sensor calibration.

fault_entries.mechanism: Backlash enlarges dead-zone motion, creating encoder mismatch and torque transfer delay between motor and load sides.
maintenance: Inspect gearbox backlash and coupler clearance.
Check reversal-region tracking for dead-zone compensation retuning.

fault_entries.mechanism: Bearing damage injects periodic impact and friction ripple, which appears first in vibration envelope and shock-sensitive channels.
maintenance: Inspect bearing race and lubrication state.
Track vibration envelope progression under repeated missions.
